---
title: "Abstract"
unnumbered: true
prelim: true
---

The University of Manchester  
{{< meta uomthesis.candidate.forename >}} {{< meta uomthesis.candidate.middle_initial >}} {{< meta uomthesis.candidate.surname >}}  
{{< meta uomthesis.degree >}}  
*{{< meta title >}}*  
{{< meta uomthesis.year >}}

Write your abstract here. The University policy (section 8.1.e) requires that the abstract not exceed one page; aim for under 350 words at 12pt with 1.5 line spacing. State the research question, the methodological approach, the principal findings, and the contribution.
